description: Neuroscience-grounded persistent memory engine for AI agents — emotional state (PAD model), per-user circadian rhythm, 5,100+ expert knowledge modules, hybrid semantic search, and a first-person journal that survives across sessions.

CELIUMS_DB_URL.description: PostgreSQL connection string. Optional — defaults to in-memory store for local dev. Required for production.

CELIUMS_QDRANT_URL.description: Qdrant vector DB URL for semantic search. Optional but strongly recommended for recall quality.

CELIUMS_VALKEY_URL.description: Valkey (or Redis) URL for distributed mutex + circadian state. Optional for single-instance deployments.

CELIUMS_LLM_API_KEY.description: OpenAI-compatible API key (BYOK). Enables AI-backed tools: journal_*, write_*, research_synthesize, ethics_trace. Works with OpenAI, Anthropic, OpenRouter, DeepInfra, Groq, local Ollama, etc.

CELIUMS_LLM_BASE_URL.description: Override the default OpenAI base URL when using BYOK with a non-OpenAI provider.

CELIUMS_LLM_MODEL.description: Model name for AI-backed tools. Whatever your CELIUMS_LLM_BASE_URL exposes.

CELIUMS_SEARCH_URL.description: External corpus-search backend (any service exposing POST /v1/search). Required only for research_search and research_synthesize.

CELIUMS_CROSS_PROJECT_ADMINS.description: Comma-separated userIds allowed to call recall with projectId='all' (cross-project recon). Empty by default; only set for admin/operator userIds.

tools.name: forage
tools.description: Search 5,100+ expert knowledge modules by natural language query. Hybrid full-text + semantic ranking. No LLM key required.

tools.name: absorb
tools.description: Load the full content of a knowledge module by exact name. Returns the module body for reasoning.

tools.name: sense
tools.description: Get personalized module recommendations based on a goal or task description.

tools.name: map_network
tools.description: Browse the entire knowledge network organized by category and module count.

tools.name: remember
tools.description: Store information in persistent memory with PAD emotional analysis, importance scoring, and circadian-adjusted arousal. Refuses credential-like content since v1.2.1.

tools.name: recall
tools.description: Search persistent memory using semantic + emotional relevance ranking with SAR filtering. projectId='all' requires admin:cross_project scope since v1.2.1.

tools.name: ethics_trace
tools.description: Run the full ethics engine v2 pipeline (Layers A+B+C) on content and return the trace + final decision. AI-backed.

tools.name: celiums_ai
tools.description: Send a prompt to a router that picks the right model for the task. AI-backed.

tools.name: bloom
tools.description: Generate polished content (blog posts, SOPs, reports) anchored to your knowledge modules. AI-backed.

tools.name: cultivate
tools.description: Adapt and reformat content for specific platforms or audiences. AI-backed.

tools.name: synthesize
tools.description: Apply a knowledge module to solve a specific task. Loads module, reasons over it, returns answer. AI-backed.

tools.name: decompose
tools.description: Break down complex content into structured, reusable knowledge fragments. AI-backed.

tools.name: construct
tools.description: Build a knowledge artifact by combining multiple modules and constraints. AI-backed.

tools.name: pollinate
tools.description: Enrich data with AI analysis (deep analysis, executive summary, comparative review, etc.). AI-backed.

tools.name: journal_write
tools.description: Append a first-person entry to the agent's persistent diary (auto-embedded, importance-scored). Refuses credential-like content since v1.2.1. AI-backed.

tools.name: journal_recall
tools.description: Search the agent's journal semantically + by tag + by entry type. AI-backed.

tools.name: journal_arc
tools.description: Build a coherent narrative arc across the agent's recent journal entries with anti-confabulation guardrails. AI-backed.

tools.name: journal_introspect
tools.description: Ask the agent's journal a self-question; answers grounded only in real entries. AI-backed.

tools.name: journal_dialogue
tools.description: The user replies to one of the agent's user-shared journal entries; the agent reacts and updates its self-model. AI-backed.

tools.name: write_project_create
tools.description: Create a writing project (novel, screenplay, long-form). Returns project_id used by the rest of the write_* family.

tools.name: write_project_get
tools.description: Get full project state: metadata, characters, scene count, last continuity check.

tools.name: write_character_create
tools.description: Create or upsert a character. Voice sample is critical for cross-scene consistency.

tools.name: write_scene_create
tools.description: Insert a scene at a specific position. POV character + location + timeline marker tracked.

tools.name: write_scene_update
tools.description: Replace a scene's content. Automatic snapshot of the previous version into the revision log.

tools.name: write_continuity_check
tools.description: Structural continuity check across the manuscript: secrets-known-at-chapter, worldbuilding rules, timeline order. AI-backed.

tools.name: write_export
tools.description: Export the writing project as a markdown manuscript.

tools.name: research_project_create
tools.description: Create a persistent research project. Returns project_id used by the rest of the research_* family.

tools.name: research_project_list
tools.description: List all research projects for a user, with finding/gap counts.

tools.name: research_project_continue
tools.description: Resume context from a paused research project. Returns the current state, findings, and open gaps.

tools.name: research_search
tools.description: Hybrid search across the configured corpus (BM25 + semantic). Requires CELIUMS_SEARCH_URL.

tools.name: research_synthesize
tools.description: Run a hybrid search and synthesize the top-K results into a structured answer with citations. AI-backed + requires CELIUMS_SEARCH_URL.

tools.name: research_finding_add
tools.description: Record an atomic claim with its evidence into the project.

tools.name: research_gap_add
tools.description: Flag an unresolved question — something searched for but not adequately answered.

tools.name: research_export
tools.description: Export the project as a markdown memo (question, findings with citations, gaps, recommendations).
